summary: High‑energy show highlighted by a blistering St Stephen and Bertha; audience/matrix recording captures the excitement despite some vocal raggedness.
review: The concert is remembered as one of the hottest shows, with first‑set gems like Jack Straw and Birdsong and an even more powerful second set featuring Wang Dang, a rock‑in‑the‑pre‑drums run and a soaring Bertha. St Stephen and a rare China Doll (with Phil on vocals) are singled out as standout moments, and listeners are urged to seek out a matrix or audience source to feel the live energy.

ai_rating.rationale: The single detailed review is overwhelmingly positive about both performance and listenability, suggesting an excellent show with a decent audience/matrix capture; limited number of reviews lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific sound issues mentioned; reviewer recommends matrix or audience source to experience the concert, implying the recording is listenable and captures the live energy well.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set strong with multiple highlights; second set ramps up energy, especially the pre‑drums run and Bertha, delivering a nonstop high‑octane experience.

band_member_comments.Phil: Phil sang lead on China Doll (rare at the time) and had his own mic, which was noted as a special moment.
band_member_comments.Drums: Pre‑drums run described as "rockin," indicating a powerful drum performance.
